traits.name: core:parietal_eye
traits.description: A small light-sensing eye set into the top of the skull, watching the sky. Like the pineal eye of a tuatara or lizard, it reads day length and the passing shadow of a hawk overhead.

traits.name: core:dermal_photoreception
traits.description: The whole hide feels the fall of light, without any eye at all. Like a sea urchin that is one diffuse eye, or an octopus whose skin sees color, the creature senses brightness across its entire surface.

traits.name: core:sky_polarization_compass
traits.description: The dome of the sky is threaded with invisible lines of polarized light radiating from the sun. Like a foraging bee under a patch of clear blue, the creature reads this e-vector pattern to hold a true heading.

traits.name: core:sun_compass
traits.description: An internal clock corrects for the sun's slow arc, turning a moving light into a fixed bearing. Like a migrating monarch riding south, the creature keeps its course by the time-compensated sun.

traits.name: core:infrasound_detection
traits.description: Sound too deep to hear, felt as a slow shudder in the bones. Like elephants rumbling to one another across savanna miles, the creature senses distant storms, quakes, and herds through the low pulse of the earth and air.

traits.name: core:ultrasound_detection
traits.description: A hearing that climbs far above our ceiling into shrill, secret frequencies. Like a moth that hears the hunting cry of a bat, the creature listens where the world seems silent.

traits.name: core:johnstons_organ
traits.description: Sound is heard through the trembling of a feathery antenna rather than an ear. Like a mosquito or fruit fly sensing the wingbeat song of a mate, the creature listens with its feelers.

traits.name: core:lateral_line
traits.description: A line of tiny hair-cells running down the flank feels the water move. Like a fish sensing the swirl of a passing body or the wall it must not strike, the creature reads the currents pressing against its skin.

traits.name: core:hydrodynamic_reception
traits.description: A body sliding through water leaves a wake that lingers for many seconds. Like a blind seal chasing a fish by the vortex trail its whiskers can feel, the creature follows the invisible turbulence of prey long gone from sight.

traits.name: core:rheoreception
traits.description: The creature feels the direction and strength of the flow it sits within, orienting to face upstream. It holds station in a river or tide the way a trout points its nose into the current.

traits.name: core:anemoreception
traits.description: Moving air brushes fine sensors and reveals its speed and heading. Like an insect casting into the breeze to trace a scent to its source, the creature reads the wind as both compass and messenger.

traits.name: core:filiform_hair_sense
traits.description: Ultra-fine hairs bend to the faintest puff of near-field air, wired to trigger escape in milliseconds. Like the cercal hairs on a cricket that feel a wasp's lunge before it lands, the creature senses attack as a whisper of moving air.

traits.name: core:tactile_mechanoreception
traits.description: The oldest sense of all, the simple knowledge of contact and pressure against the body. Every brush, grip, and blow registers as the world pushing back.

traits.name: core:vibrissae_whiskers
traits.description: Stiff, richly-nerved whiskers reach out to palpate the world beyond the skin. Like a rat sweeping its whiskers across a surface in the dark, the creature builds a fine tactile map of every crevice and edge.

traits.name: core:thermoreception_ambient
traits.description: The creature feels the ambient warmth and chill of its surroundings and drifts toward comfort. It seeks the sun-warmed stone and flees the killing cold, reading temperature as a gradient to be climbed.

traits.name: core:noxious_heat_sensing
traits.description: A sharp threshold sense that screams when temperature crosses into damage. The same channels that make chili peppers feel hot fire here to yank the body back from flame and scald.

traits.name: core:statocyst_gravity
traits.description: A tiny grain settles under gravity inside a fluid chamber, and hair-cells feel which way is down. Like the statocyst of a jellyfish or crab, this simple pendulum keeps the creature upright in a dark and formless sea.

traits.name: core:vestibular_balance
traits.description: Fluid-filled loops sense every turn, tilt, and lurch of the head. Like the inner ear that lets a cat right itself in midair, this sense fuses gravity and motion into a steady grip on which way is up.

traits.name: core:tuberous_electroreceptors
traits.description: Specialized receptors tuned to the fast, self-generated electric pulses of active electrolocation. They pick out the rapid flutter of another electric creature's discharge from the slow murmur of the world.

traits.name: core:jamming_avoidance_response
traits.description: When two electric creatures' fields collide and blur, each shifts its own frequency to stay clear. This reflexive computation keeps electrolocation sharp in a crowd, a neat piece of neural arithmetic done without thought.

traits.name: core:magnetoreception_inclination
traits.description: The creature reads the dip angle of the planet's magnetic field, sensing the steepness rather than the poles. Like a migrating robin that knows equator from pole by how sharply the field tilts into the ground, it navigates by magnetic latitude.

traits.name: core:magnetoreception_polarity
traits.description: A compass that distinguishes true north from south by the direction the field points. Like a mole-rat sensing polarity underground, the creature holds an absolute magnetic heading no matter the tilt of the terrain.

traits.name: core:cryptochrome_light_magnetism
traits.description: A quantum trick in the eye where light-triggered molecules feel the magnetic field as a faint pattern laid over vision. The creature may literally see the compass, a shimmer that brightens or dims with its heading, as songbirds are thought to.

traits.name: core:baroreception_internal
traits.description: Sensors in vessels and cavities monitor the pressure of the creature's own fluids. This quiet inner gauge keeps blood-flow and buoyancy in balance, feeling the push of circulation from the inside.

traits.name: core:interoception
traits.description: An inward-facing awareness of the body's own state: hunger, fullness, breathlessness, the hammering of the heart. The brain reads its vessels and viscera and turns their signals into drives and feelings.

traits.name: core:electric_field_imaging
traits.description: An alien elaboration of electric sense that resolves the world in exquisite three-dimensional detail of charge and conductance. The creature perceives shape, texture, and hidden interiors as a glowing sculpture of electric fields, a way of seeing with no light at all.

traits.name: core:microwave_thermal_sense
traits.description: A wholly alien sensory band that reads the microwave glow every warm object radiates, seeing through fog, dust, and thin walls. The creature perceives heat-shadows at a distance no infrared pit could reach.

traits.name: core:ionizing_radiation_sense
traits.description: A rare and strange sense that registers the sleet of gamma rays and decaying particles passing through living tissue. The creature flinches from a buried ore vein or a fresh fallout plume that no other animal can perceive.

traits.name: core:neutrino_flux_sense
traits.description: A sense bordering on the impossible, tuned to the ghostly neutrinos that stream from the local star and pour unimpeded through solid worlds. The creature might feel day and night through solid rock, or sense the death-throes of a distant sun.

traits.name: core:gravity_wave_sense
traits.description: The most speculative sense of all, an organ that trembles to ripples in spacetime itself. When two distant black holes collide, this creature feels the fabric of the cosmos ring, a whisper from the far reaches of physics.

traits.name: core:magnetic_field_imaging
traits.description: An alien overgrowth of magnetic sense that resolves the full three-dimensional structure of surrounding fields. The creature sees ore bodies, electric currents, and living muscle as luminous flux-lines threading the dark.

traits.name: core:planetary_resonance_sense
traits.description: An exotic sense attuned to the slow electromagnetic heartbeat of the whole planet, the standing waves that ring in the cavity between ground and sky. The creature feels lightning storms half a world away and the pulse of its own planet as a constant, grounding hum.
